name: Feature idea
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Idea] "

---

## Problem or opportunity

What pain point or use case should this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature at a high level (UI, data, export, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Optional: other approaches you thought about.

## Extra context

Optional: links, examples from other apps, or priority (nice-to-have vs blocking).
